title: BetterBrushes
body:
BetterBrushes

![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)
![g](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)
![coffee](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)



BetterBrushes adds more brush variety to the game and improved crafting.


New update!




Brushes:
Gold Brush: 54 HP

Diamond Brush:  340 HP

Iron Brush: 250 HP

Netherite Brush: 500 HP


 
Crafting:



Improved feather

Material

Stick

 
Changelog:
- Updated brush textures
- Fixed crafts
 

 


FAQ
